creator: ve@sci.fi
text:
Fetchmail has been upgraded to version 5.2.8 by the author.

Fix: Commit the patches below.

Note, that I'm unable to verify the operation of this port with
Kerberos and inet6, but they should work just OK as no major changes
have been made, and the FreeBSD related patches didn't need any
updating. I have tested building and basic operations. 

How-To-Repeat: 
% cd /usr/ports/mail/fetchmail
% make

Note that it builds an old version ;-)
